title: Das Baby mit dem Goldzahn
overview: In the distant horror future, Germany groans under the yoke of the brutal dictator Rado. He likes to systematically dumb down the population and, almost more seriously, outlaw pop songs and drive all pop singers underground. In this time of darkness, the beautiful maiden Lea sets off in search of the fairytale baby with the golden tooth, who, according to legend, is the only one who can put the oppressor in his place. She is supported in her quest by pop revolutionary Toni Valloni.
